summary: Implemented the fixed-profile Sochi rule-state machine for bidding, all-pass, contract ordering, widow pickup, discard, whist/check/half-whist decisions, contract and misere trick play, trick winner resolution, deal settlement, next-deal continuation, and bullet completion; updated AI/test harness compatibility and kept legal actions phase-scoped through getLegalActions.
